**From:**"Devteam (PluginHive)" <support@pluginhive.com>
**Reply to:** PluginHive <support@pluginhive.com>
**Date:** Friday, 8 May 2026 at 2:34 pm
**To:** Danielle Robertson <danni@robertsonweb.com.au>
**Subject:** [PluginHive] Re: FW: Delivery not available with online order



Your request (388243) has been updated. To add additional comments, reply to this email.

**Devteam** (PluginHive)

May 8, 2026, 10:04 GMT+5:30

Hello Danielle,

Hope you are doing well.

For TNT Australia, pickup time is a mandatory field to retrieve rates, and the pickup cut-off time varies based on the pickup location.

For your postal code, the current pickup cut-off time is **1:00 PM**. However, this may change depending on slot availability at the nearest pickup location. If all pickup slots are filled for the selected time, TNT will not return live rates. This process is entirely managed by TNT Australia.

That said, we are currently working on a solution to address this limitation, and it is expected to be released in the next couple of weeks.

For now, I have configured the pickup time and cut-off time on your account, and the rates are being returned successfully.

Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

Best Regards,
Veena
Team PluginHive



Attachment(s)
Screenshot 2026-05-08 at 9.56.25 AM.png



**Danielle Robertson**

May 8, 2026, 09:43 GMT+5:30

**Same issue occurring week after week. This is not normal. Please advise permanent resolve.**





Cheers
Danielle



**Now booking projects for April/May 2026 and beyond.
If you’d like a quote or to book a discovery session, visit www.robertsonweb.com.au_ _**



_ _



Creative Director - Digital Designer & Developer

**www.robertsonweb.com.au**

comments.body:
Hello Danielle,

We understand this has been a recurring frustration for your client.

Our team has confirmed that TNT rates are currently showing correctly at checkout — the screenshot attached here reflects this as well, with multiple TNT services visible for the Epping VIC 3076 address.

The underlying cause, as noted previously, is that TNT's API stops returning rates once the daily pickup cutoff is reached or pickup slots are fully booked. Until the permanent fix is deployed (our team is actively working on this), we strongly recommend adding a fallback shipping option to protect your client's checkout from being blocked:

1. Go to WooCommerce > Settings > Shipping > Shipping Zones
2. Click on the zone where TNT Australia is configured
3. Click "Add shipping method" and add a Flat Rate method
4. Set a reasonable flat rate as a backup (e.g., based on your client's typical TNT shipping cost)

With this in place, customers will still have a shipping option at checkout even during periods when TNT rates are temporarily unavailable — rather than seeing a blank shipping section.

We will follow up once the permanent fix has been deployed so this manual workaround is no longer needed.

Thanks and regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

Hello Danielle,
 
We understand this has been a recurring frustration for your client.
 
Our team has confirmed that TNT rates are currently showing correctly at checkout — the screenshot attached here reflects this as well, with multiple TNT services visible for the Epping VIC 3076 address.
 
The underlying cause, as noted previously, is that TNT's API stops returning rates once the daily pickup cutoff is reached or pickup slots are fully booked. Until the permanent fix is deployed (our team is actively working on this), we strongly recommend adding a fallback shipping option to protect your client's checkout from being blocked:
 
1. Go to WooCommerce > Settings > Shipping > Shipping Zones
2. Click on the zone where TNT Australia is configured
3. Click "Add shipping method" and add a Flat Rate method
4. Set a reasonable flat rate as a backup (e.g., based on your client's typical TNT shipping cost)
 
With this in place, customers will still have a shipping option at checkout even during periods when TNT rates are temporarily unavailable — rather than seeing a blank shipping section.
 
We will follow up once the permanent fix has been deployed so this manual workaround is no longer needed.
 
Thanks and regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Danielle,

Hope you are doing well.

I am following up regarding the recent enhancements for TNT Australia.

**Quick context on what was happening:** We reviewed the TNT Australia rate failure behavior in detail and identified that TNT Australia temporarily blocks collection slots due to operational capacity constraints. If the requested collection window falls within one of these blocked periods, TNT may not return rates.

**Safeguard solution:** To ensure that checkout remains available and customers can continue placing orders around the clock, we have now introduced a **Fallback Rate** option at the service level. This allows you to configure a fixed fallback rate for each TNT service. Whenever a live rate cannot be retrieved, the configured fallback rate will be displayed instead, ensuring that customers can still complete their purchases.

Please note that fallback rates may also be displayed in cases where a customer enters an incomplete or incorrect address.

**What's coming next:** In addition to this safeguard, we are also working on a more comprehensive enhancement. The goal is to automatically advance the collection request to the next available pickup day or slot whenever there is a limitation from TNT's end, allowing the plugin to retrieve live TNT rates without any manual intervention.

The Fallback Rate enhancement is already available and ensures orders can be placed 24/7 today, while the automatic scheduling enhancement is currently in progress. We will keep you updated as soon as it becomes available.

**NOTE:** The Fallback Rate option can be configured from App **Settings > Shipping Rates > Carrier Services >** select **"TNT Australia"** option from the drop-down **> Enable Fallback Rates > Add Service**, as shown in the attached screenshot.

Please review the checkout experience at different times of the day and let us know how it works on your end.

Thank you again for your patience and feedback.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/jdiydivylmnpP82IZgL0U7OL6/?name=Screenshot+2026-06-04+at+7.23.58+PM.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/hYWdBR5GQ8CF2uEp38zm1cpD6/?name=Screenshot+2026-06-04+at+7.26.44+PM.png)


Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

If the requested collection window falls within one of these blocked periods, TNT may not return rates.
 
Safeguard solution: To ensure that checkout remains available and customers can continue placing orders around the clock, we have now introduced a Fallback Rate option at the service level. This allows you to configure a fixed fallback rate for each TNT service. Whenever a live rate cannot be retrieved, the configured fallback rate will be displayed instead, ensuring that customers can still complete their purchases. 
 
Please note that fallback rates may also be displayed in cases where a customer enters an incomplete or incorrect address.
 
What's coming next: In addition to this safeguard, we are also working on a more comprehensive enhancement. The goal is to automatically advance the collection request to the next available pickup day or slot whenever there is a limitation from TNT's end, allowing the plugin to retrieve live TNT rates without any manual intervention.
 
The Fallback Rate enhancement is already available and ensures orders can be placed 24/7 today, while the automatic scheduling enhancement is currently in progress. We will keep you updated as soon as it becomes available.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
